message:
fix(db/cache): hold by_key lock in put_agent_scoped and warm_agents_scoped (br-ctf33)

Same lock-holding pattern as br-pf84h (a8682e33): remove the explicit
`{ ... }` block that dropped the agents_by_key write guard before
acquiring agents_by_id. Without this, a concurrent invalidate_agent
could interleave between the two insertions and skip the by_id cleanup.

Also applied to warm_agents_scoped which had the same gap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
